parties.name: MOYE, MALINKA 40.42 PARSONS STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94118

calendar.matters:
Petition For Appointment Of Malinka Tacuma Wade Moye As Successor Trustee Of Hurdle Trust
Off Calendar Feb-24-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any counsel, party or interested person.

9:21 a.m. This matter was continued from January 21, 2009 to give Mr. Moye the opportunity to present information and retain Counsel. The Court is not aware of any contact from Mr. Moye. The Court denied the petition with prejudice.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Shannon.

Ex Parte Petition For Appointment Of Malinka Tacuma Wde Moye As Temporary Successor
Off Calendar Feb-17-2009 Off Calendar

Petition For Appointment Of Malinka Tacuma Wade Moye As Successor Trustee Of Hurdle Trust
Off Calendar Jan-21-2009 Continued To Feb-24-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Malinka Moye in Propria Persona.

The Court explained to Mr. Moye the difference between a summons and a subpoena. Mr. Moye requested a short continuance stating that he had obtained Counsel. The Court advised Mr. Moye that Counsel would need more time to review the matter and to determine the best way to proceed. The matter was continued to February 24, 2009. The Court informed Mr. Moye that if Counsel was not present at the next hearing, that the Court would go forward with the petition on that date.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Ex Parte Petition For Temporary Successor Trustee Of Hurdle Trust, Latter Awaiting Permanent Appointment Of Successor Trustee On January 21, 2009
Off Calendar Jan-16-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Malinka Moye in Propria Persona.

The Court denied the petition stating that there was no emergency and that the matter was to be heard on Tuesday. The Court also advised Mr. Moye to seek Counsel.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Ng.

Ex Parte Petition For Temporary Appointment Of Malinka Tacuma Wade Moye As Successor Of Hurdle Trust. Latter Awaiting Appointment As Permanent Successor On January 21, 2009.
Off Calendar Dec-23-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Malinka Moye in Propria Persona.

Mr. Moye stated that there never was a trust and stated that he was unaware of the Family members crimnial activities. The Court suggested Mr. Moye seek Counsel. The matter was taken off calendar and to be heard on January 21, 2009.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Nuque.

Petition For Appointment Of Chester Hurdle, Hannah Jane Toomey, Only Surviving Children Of Slave Andrew Jackson Hurdle, & Malinka Tacuma Wade Moye Successors Of Hurdle Trust
Off Calendar Dec-16-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Malinka Moye in Propria Persona.

Mr. Moye stated that he spoke to Chester Hurdle and to Hannah Jane Toomey and they wished not to be invlolved in the matter. The matter was taken off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Ex Parte Petition For Temporary Appointment Of Chester Hurdle, Hannah Jane Toomey, Only Surviving Children Of Slave, Andrew Jackson Hurdle, & Malinka Tacuma Wade Moye Successor Of Hurdle Trust.
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Off Calendar

Petition For Appointment Of Chester Hurdle. Hannah Jane Toomey. Only Surviving Children Of Slave. Andrew Jackson Hurdle & Malinka Tacuma Wade Moye Successors Of Hurdle Trust
Off Calendar Mar-18-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person. The Court stated that the petitoner was not known and that the party in Pro Per failed to file the bond required for vexatious litigants. The Court took the matter off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Kathy Kollehner CSR#4102. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago
